center.name: 桌山國家公園 (南非)
center.summary: 桌山國家公園 (南非)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Sentinel rock thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sentinel rock thrush (Monticola explorator) is a species of passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is found in Lesotho, South Africa, and Eswatini

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sentinel rock thrush (Monticola explorator) is a species of passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is found in Lesotho, South Africa, and Eswatini
